creator: luser@belgarion.com
text:
Fresh installation from ports does not work, errormessage: bind to port 6680 failed: Invalid argument.

[2007-01-27 17:16:23] CtrlProxy 3.0.1 starting
[2007-01-27 17:16:23] bind to port 6680 failed: Invalid argument
[2007-01-27 17:16:23] Joining channel #ctrlproxy (admin)
[2007-01-27 17:16:23] Unable to redirect response 332 (admin)
^C[2007-01-27 17:16:26] Received signal 2, quitting...
[2007-01-27 17:16:26] Disconnecting (admin)
ctrlproxy in free(): warning: junk pointer, too high to make sense
ctrlproxy in free(): warning: junk pointer, too high to make sense

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/irc/ctrlproxy/
make
make install
su to normal user
ctrlproxy --init
ctrlproxy
